title: Exploring the energy‑climate‑agriculture (ECA) nexus: a roadmap toward agricultural sustainability in Asian countries
authors: Abbas Ali Chandio; Korhan K. Gokmenoglu; Devi Prasad Dash; Irfan Khan; Fayyaz Ahmad; Yuansheng Jiang
abstract: This study examines the interconnections between energy, climate, and agriculture in Asian countries, proposing sustainable pathways for agricultural development while addressing climate challenges and energy requirements.
keywords: energy-climate-agriculture nexus; agricultural sustainability; Asia; climate change; sustainable development
citation: Chandio, A. A., Gokmenoglu, K. K., Dash, D. P., Khan, I., Ahmad, F., & Jiang, Y. (2023). Exploring the energy‑climate‑agriculture (ECA) nexus: a roadmap toward agricultural sustainability in Asian countries. Environment, Development and Sustainability.

title: Securing a sustainable future: the climate change threat to agriculture, food security, and sustainable development goals
authors: Anam Saleem; Sobia Anwar; Taufiq Nawaz; Shah Fahad; Shah Saud; Tanzeel Ur Rahman; Muhammad Nasir Rasheed Khan; Touqir Nawaz
abstract: This review paper analyzes the impacts of climate change on agricultural productivity, food security, and the achievement of Sustainable Development Goals, proposing mitigation and adaptation strategies for sustainable agricultural futures.
keywords: climate change; agriculture; food security; sustainable development goals; SDGs; sustainability; climate adaptation
citation: Saleem, A., Anwar, S., Nawaz, T., Fahad, S., Saud, S., Rahman, T. U., Khan, M. N. R., & Nawaz, T. (2025). Securing a sustainable future: the climate change threat to agriculture, food security, and sustainable development goals. Journal of Umm Al-Qura University for Applied Sciences, 11, 595-611.
